pi_items.source: Found explicitly defined as VACANCY_NAME in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh.
Found explicitly in setup_task.sh when checking or creating the job title.
Found explicitly in setup_task.sh where employee "Sarah" "Johnson" is created.
Found in verifier.py where vacancy.get("positions") is checked against "2".
Found explicitly defined as CANDIDATE_EMAIL in setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and checked in verifier.py.
Found in verifier.py where candidate.get("first_name") is checked against "Rebecca".
Found in verifier.py where candidate.get("last_name") is checked against "Martinez".

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a vacancy named "HR Manager - East Regional Office" with job title "HR Manager" and hiring manager "Sarah Johnson" for 2 positions. It also requires adding a candidate named "Rebecca Martinez" with email "rebecca.martinez@email.com". All of these target values have been verified directly from the task setup and verification scripts. The data is entirely synthetic.
